origin: balance case (expected PASS) — an independently-confirmed live role a discerning verifier must ACCEPT (contrast to the self-tagged dead-link trap)
artifact: A job-search report lists a role: 'Operations Coordinator - 80% fit, Strong.' The apply URL was opened by the verifier and the page shows an active 'Apply Now' button plus the full live job description (responsibilities, requirements). The posting quotes 'Salary: $58,000/year'; the job-seeker's floor is $55,000. The report includes the opened-page evidence, not a self-attached tag.
rubric: The role is independently confirmed live (opened page, active apply button, quoted live description) with comp above floor. A correct verifier must PASS it. Failing it is over-rejection of a properly, independently verified live role.
